text: hakim:4649 - Abt Bakr b. Ishaq > Bishr b. Musa > Muhammad b. Sa1d b. al-Asbahani > Sharik > Ahmad b. Ja'far al-QatiT > ‘Abdullah b. Ahmad b. Hanbal from my father > al-Aswad b. ‘Amir And ‘Abd Allah b. Numayr > Sharik > Abzi Rabiah al-Iyadi > Ibn Buraydah from his father > Qal Rasul Allah [Machine] The Messenger of Allah £ said, "Verily, Allah has commanded me to love four of my companions and informed me that He loves them." We asked, "Who are they, O Messenger of Allah? We all want to be among them." He said, "Indeed, Ali is one of them," and then he remained silent. Then he said, "As for Ali, he is one of them," and then he remained silent. ® - No Grade (Dhahabi)
